voice.title: Voice-Assisted Booking
voice.subtitle: Describe your request in plain language, or type it below.
voice.inputPlaceholder: e.g. "I need someone to accompany my mother to her doctor appointment next Wednesday at 10 AM."
voice.reviewSubtitle: Please check the details below before submitting.
voice.editFields: You can edit any field below.
voice.sensitiveDataWarning: Please do not include medical records, diagnoses, or insurance information.
voice.medicalContextNote: Our companions provide non-medical companionship only — they do not provide medical care.
voice.externalProviderDisabled: Voice transcription is handled locally. No audio is sent to external services.
voice.noSeniorLinked: koi vADiL juDAYEL nATHi. kRupA kARine buKiNG pAhELA vADiL umERo.
voice.disclaimerLabel: I understand this is a non-medical companionship service.
voice.disclaimerRequired: You must acknowledge the disclaimer before submitting.
voice.manualBookingLink: Prefer to fill out the form manually?

dashboard.subtitle: TAmARA sATHiO TAMARA mATe HAJAR Che jYARE pAN TAmne jARuR hoY.
TAmARA priYAjANo mATe sATHini muLAkATo menEj kARo — kyANTHi pAN.
dashboard.bookCardDesc: muLAkAT yojoALo — DAkTARni muLAkAT, sAiR, kAM YA kAMpANi.

footer.disclaimer: Senior Companion mATR bIn-TAbibi sAhACARY Ane ChepeRon sevAo pURu pADe Che. sATHiO TAbibi sAnbhAL, vyAktiGAT kALji, kARuKARiu pARivAhan YA nANAkiY sevAo pURi pADTA nATHi.
footer.tagline: vADiLo Ane TeMnA pARivARo mATe vishvAsniY, ChAkAsAYELu sAhACARY. kARAN ke koni pAN jivAnAA mheTvpURN ksANo ekAlATA viTAvvA joiE nAhi.
footer.legalNote: LAisEnsDAR ARoGY sevA pRADATA nATHi. TAbibi pARivAhn sevA nATHi. mATR sAhACARY Ane bIn-TAbibi ChepeRon sevAo mATe.

support.subtitle: AmARi Tim sevA kLAko DARmiYAn TAmne mADD kARvA TAYYAR Che. bIn-ARjANT pRAsHno mATe, i-meiL shResHT upAY Che.
support.emergencyDesc: Senior Companion ARjANT TAbibi sevAo pURi pADTA nATHi. koiPAN TAbibi ARjANTmAn, AmARi Tim sATHe sAnpARk kARTA pAhELA TAbuRAn 112 pAR kAL kARo.
support.phoneNote: phon sApORT baDHi sAkRiY buKiNGo DARmiYAn APP mAn DikhAY Che.
support.emailNote: AmE Ek kAmkAji DiVAsmAn JAvAb DEvAnO pRYAs kARiE CHiE.
support.messagePlaceholderNote: [PLACEHOLDER: AA sTHAne pAiLAT shRu ThAY Te pAhELA sApORTno sAnpARk phORm uPALAbDH ThAshE.]

faq.subtitle: jAvAb mALYo nAhi? {support} pAR sAnpARk kARo YA {phone} pAR kAL kARo.
faq.q1_1_a: Senior Companion vADiLo Ane TeMnA pARivARone bIn-TAbibi sAhACARY Ane ChepeRon sevAo mATe TAlimBADD, bEkGRAuND-cheKD sATHiO sATHe joDE Che.
faq.q1_2_a: sATHi moTAR sAhACARY pURu pADe Che, nEviGEshAnmAn mADD kARe Che Ane muLAkAT DARmiYAn vADiLni suRAsHA suni shCHe.
faq.q1_3_a: sATHiO DAvo AAPATO nATHi, TAbibi sAnbhAL pURi pADTA nATHi, vADiLne TeMnA vAhAnmAn lE jATA nATHi, pAsA YA nANAni sAnbhAL RkhTA nATHi.
faq.q1_4_a: nA. Senior Companion mATR sAhACARY Ane ChepeRon sevA Che. TAbibi ARjANTmAn hAmeshA 112 pAR kAL kARo.
faq.q2_1_a: buKiNG AYojiT shRuATni smAY kARTA oCHAmAn oCHA 12 kALeAK pAhELA kARvAni jARuR Che.
faq.q2_2_q: buKiNG keTli lAMbi hoi shkE Che?
faq.q2_2_a: buKiNGo 2 ThI 6 kLAK vCChE hoy Che. sevA kLAko sAvARe 8 ThI rAT 8 sudi Che.
faq.q2_3_q: shu pARivARik sADASYA vADiLni jAGAE buk kARi shkE Che?
faq.q2_3_a: hA. pARivARik sADASYA khATu bAnAvi, vADiLni pROPhAiL sATHe joDAine, TeMnA vATiAmAn buk kARi shkE Che.
faq.q2_4_q: shu hum buKiNG RAD kARi shkAY Che?
faq.q2_4_a: hA, shRuATni smAYTHi 24 kLAk pAhELA koiPaN shuLk vGAR. moDi RAD YA no-sho mATe shuLK LAGi shkE Che.
faq.q2_5_q: sATHiO buKiNGo sATHe kesHi RAte mELAVAY Che?
faq.q2_5_a: AmARi sisTEM upLAbDHTAi, sTHAn, bhAshA Ane pRAvRuTTi pRAkARnA ADhAre sAnGATi sATHiO sUChAve Che.
faq.q3_1_q: sATHiOni kesHi RAte ChAkAsANi kARAY Che?
faq.q3_1_a: baDhA sATHiO ARji puRi kARE Che, bEkGRAuND cheK pAs kARE Che, Ane koi buKiNG svikARATA pAhELA AmARA Tme DvARA mENuYALi mANjuRi meLeVE Che.
faq.q3_2_q: sATHi pAhoChYO KE nAhi TEmANe kesHi RAte JANu?
faq.q3_2_a: sATHiO pRAtYek muLAkATnE shiRuATe App mAn cheK in kARE Che. cheK in puShTi ThAY TYARe TAmne sUChANA meLeShE.
faq.q3_3_a: jO koi TAbibi ARjANT ThaY, To sATHine TAbuRAn 112 pAR kAL kARvAni Ane pChiThI sApORT Timne jANkARi kARvAni sUChAnA Che.
faq.q3_4_q: shu hum sATHini oLKh juO shKiE ChiE?
faq.q3_4_a: hA. sATHiOe pRAtYek muLAkAT DARmiYAn TeMno Senior Companion pARiChY bEJH pAhERvAno hoY Che.
faq.q4_1_q: ChUkAvANio kesHi RAte kAM kARE Che?
faq.q4_1_a: baDhA ChUkAvANio buKiNG smAYE pLEeTphORm mARphAT suRAsHisth RitE prOsEs kARAY Che. nAkA svikARATA nATHi.
faq.q4_2_a: kiMmATo pRAvRuTTi pRAkAR Ane smAYGALA pRAmANe bADAY Che. koiPaN buKiNG puShTi kARTA pAhELA ANkuCHiT kul juShE.
faq.q4_3_a: pATRA RADkARNio mATe RiPhAnD 5–10 kAmkAji DiVAsmAn prOsEs kARAY Che. support@seniorcompanion.example.com pAR sAnpARk kARo.
faq.q5_1_a: Senior Companion huMALTAmAn nAnA sAmuDAYiK pAiLAT proGrAmmAn Che. AA proGrAm mAYADiT sTHAnoE upLAbDH Che.
faq.q5_2_a: pRAtYek puRi ThAYELi muLAkAT bAD TAmne App mAn TuNkAi phiDbeK phORm bhARvAnu AAMAnTRAN meLShE.
faq.q5_3_a: pLEeTphORm ANGrEJi, sSpEnish, hiNDi, TAmiL Ane bAkini ANek bhAshAone sApORD kARE Che.

location.title: muLAkAT kyAn Che?

location.destinationHint: jO muLAkAT koik khAs sTHAnE jAvAnu sAmEL kARE Che, To TEnE YAHAN DAkHAL kARo.
location.transportNote: sATHiO vyAktiGAT vAhAn sAhACARY pURu pADTA nATHi. bAhAri jAvA mATe kRupA RiKshA, sARvAjAnik pARivAhAn YA ChALvAnu goThAvo.

notes.title: vADhARAnA noND?
notes.subtitle: sATHiO TEYArAR ThAvAmAn mADD kARe TEvi mAhiTi sheYAR kARo.
notes.label: noND
notes.placeholder: dA.t. ElinoR TeMnA bAGiChA viShE vAT kARvAnu pAsAND kARE Che. kRupA 5 miniT vhELA pAho.
notes.safetyWarning: kRupA TAmARi noNDmAn TAbibi RekORD, DAvAni mAhiTi, nANAkiY mAhiTi YA sAnvedAnshiL vyAktiGAT mAhiTi sAmEL nA kARo.

review.title: TAmARi viNATini sAmiksHA kARo
review.subtitle: sAbmit kARTA pAhELA nIChEni viGATo ChEk kARo Ane sevAno DisKLEMAR sviKARo.
review.disclaimerText:
Senior Companion mATR bIn-TAbibi sAhACARY Ane ChepeRon sevAo pURu pADe Che.
AmARA sATHiO ARoGY sevA pRADATA nATHi Ane DAvA AApi shkTA nATHi, TAbibi sAlAh AApi shkTA nATHi.

mheTvpURN: TAmARi buKiNG noNDmAn TAbibi, nANAkiY YA sAnvedAnshiL mAhiTi sAmEL nA kARo.

AA viNATi sAbmit kARine TAmE puShTi kARo Ke sevA mATR bIn-TAbibi sAhACARY mATe Che.
review.checkboxLabel: hum sevAno DisKLEMAR vANCHYo Ane sAmJYo Chu. hum puShTi kARu Chu ke AA buKiNG mATR bIn-TAbibi sAhACARY mATe Che.
